# domain

**Instance Property**

The domain that this instance manages.

## Declaration

```swift
var domain: any ContactProviderDomain { get }
```

## Discussion

This value defaults to [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/DefaultContactProviderDomain].

## Managing the domain

- **enable()**: Requests the person using the app to enable the extension domain.
- **isEnabled**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the person using the app enabled the extension domain.
- **reset()**: Resets the extension domain.
- **disable()**: Disables the extension domain.
